interpretation.avg_sections_per_entry: 4.0 = all tracked sections (Signal/Judgment/Links/Open) present; <3.0 = sections skipped regularly
interpretation.open_carry_forward: High = active threads; very high relative to entries = unresolved debt
interpretation.promotion_date_mentions: 0 is fine early; sustained 0 over months = notebook may not be feeding STRATEGY.md

notes: Recommendation acceptance/rejection rates: need operator workflow.
Cross-lane references: manual until automated extract.
judgment_quality metrics are computed from on-disk notebook state.
